name: G Collado, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: G Collado, S.A.B. de C.V. engages in the processing and manufacturing of steel products in Mexico. It offers blueprints, plates, pipelines, commercial profiles, polished and galvanized wires, economizers, and meshes and derivatives, as well as products for construction. The company was founded in 1949 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
